config.name: Stelow: triage
config.description: Initial assessment. Determine if this is a valid request.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the triage stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: select
config.description: Item selection. Rank accepted items, user picks one.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the select stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: setup
config.description: Setup context. Explore codebase, gather requirements.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the setup stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: context
config.description: Strategic context. Market analysis, JTBD, domain detection. Gated by `context:5` (appetite/review mode): Product Spec Gate+Auto skips; others use reduced ask. See `stages/context.md#context:5`.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the context stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: shape
config.description: Shape stage. Define appetite, hill chart, rabbit holes.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the shape stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: critique
config.description: Plan critique. Pre-flight check before gate.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the critique stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: gate
config.description: Gate review. Visual approval via visual review required. Use `visual_review` tool (not bash).
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the gate stage. Fusion has no native visual_review tool: complete the canonical fallback by writing .stelow/approvals/{dirHash}/{file}.approved.md before advancing. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: scope
config.description: Scope adjustment. Add/remove from IN/OUT after gate approval.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the scope stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: interface
config.description: Interface alternatives. Appetite-scaled exploration: 1, 3, or 5 proposals + hybrid.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the interface stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: int-gate
config.description: Interface gate. Visual review of all interface proposals. Use `visual_review` tool (not bash).
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the int-gate stage. Fusion has no native visual_review tool: complete the canonical fallback by writing .stelow/approvals/{dirHash}/{file}.approved.md before advancing. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: selection
config.description: Interface selection. User picks via structured question.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the selection stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: planning
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the planning stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: plan-gate
config.description: Tech plan gate. Visual review of spec-tech.md via visual review. Only in Product Spec + Interface + Tech Review or Code Diff mode.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the plan-gate stage. Fusion has no native visual_review tool: complete the canonical fallback by writing .stelow/approvals/{dirHash}/{file}.approved.md before advancing. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: execution
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the execution stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: verification
config.description: Verification. Run full test suite, code review, UI audit, browser testing.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the verification stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: diff-gate
config.description: Code diff review. visual review review of working tree diff. Only in Product Spec + Interface + Tech Review + Code Diff mode.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the diff-gate stage. Fusion has no native visual_review tool: complete the canonical fallback by writing .stelow/approvals/{dirHash}/{file}.approved.md before advancing. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

config.name: Stelow: audit
config.description: Final audit. Verify all requirements met.
config.prompt: Load the stelow-product-orchestrator skill and execute only the audit stage. Follow stages.yaml and persist progress in stelow.json.

settings.name: Orchestrator skill
settings.description: Agent Skill loaded by every Stelow stage node.
